hypotheses.name: Geneformer static token embedding cross-model alignment
hypotheses.method: Load Geneformer bert.embeddings.word_embeddings.weight (20275x1152) from HuggingFace cache. Map 207 named genes to token IDs. Compute pairwise cosine similarities. Test STRING pairs vs non-STRING (Mann-Whitney U). Cross-model correlation: SVD of GF embeddings, Spearman(|scGPT_SV2|, |GF_SV1|) at each of 12 scGPT layers.
hypotheses.result_value: GF_MW_p=7.8e-127, z=0.666; cross-model Spearman_abs=0.446 (mean across 12 layers, range 0.289-0.564)
hypotheses.next_action: Run Geneformer inference on lung data to get contextualized gene embeddings; compare layer-specific GF geometry with scGPT SV2 co-poles.

hypotheses.name: Multi-axis composite co-pole P@k enrichment
hypotheses.method: For each of 12 scGPT layers, SVD of 209-gene mean-centered embeddings. For SV2+SV3+SV4 (indices 1,2,3): top-K=52 and bottom-K=52 poles. Count co-polarity axes (0-3) for each named-gene pair. Compute mean fraction of STRING edges (score>=0.4) per count stratum across all 12 layers.
hypotheses.next_action: Add shuffle null for composite score; test quintile stratification within 3-axis stratum; combine with attention score for joint predictor.

hypotheses.name: TRRUST repression vs activation in scGPT attention
hypotheses.method: Load scGPT aggregated attention_scores.npy [8181x8181]. Compute symmetric mean attention for TRRUST activation (N=116), TRRUST repression (N=64), STRING (N=3091), and null (N=4949 sampled named-gene pairs). Mann-Whitney U vs null. Activation vs repression direct comparison. Activation-exclusive (not in STRING) subgroup.
hypotheses.result_value: Activation=1.95x (p=9.4e-9), Repression=1.90x (p=4.3e-3), STRING=1.13x (p=0.084, NS). Act vs Rep: p=0.172 (NS). Activation-exclusive: 2.05x (p=7.1e-6).
hypotheses.next_action: Test attention-SVD joint predictor for TF-target prediction; validate on TRRUST repression-exclusive pairs.
